default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss site mapping issues affecting GrowthX's website performance and indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple technical SEO issues identified, including incorrect page titles, redirects, and thin content pages](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Usman to fix title tag connections for blogs and case studies, remove old unused pages, and update site structure](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [95 pages currently not indexed; manual checks and indexing requests needed initially](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Content creation continues as normal; 10 more articles by Martha expected this week](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

## Topics

### Current Website Issues

  - [Page titles: Many pages (100+) incorrectly named "live in the site"](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Redirects: 301 redirects affecting blog and case study pages](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Thin content: Several pages (e.g., industry pages) lack sufficient text content](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Site structure: URLs pointing to www, but sitemap still set to HTTP](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Indexing: 95 pages not indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### Technical Fixes

  - [Connect title tags for blogs and case studies to auto-populate correctly](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Remove old, unused pages after the call](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Update site structure to resolve redirect issues](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Manually check and request indexing for new content initially](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Consider standardized template for case study pages to improve content depth](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [No specific character count requirement, focus on user intent and value](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Build out thin content pages to provide more context for Google](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Continue normal content publication schedule (10 articles/week by Martha)](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Current performance reports not fully representative due to indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Expect improvements once technical issues are resolved](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Usman to implement technical fixes (title tags, redirects, site structure)](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Team to manually check blog post indexing after fixes](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Usman to notify Jenn when issues are resolved for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Weekly indexing check-ins until Google automatically indexes new content](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Beatriz to add Usman to Slack channel for proactive issue management](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Continue content creation as scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/yhFwpAMGkhENr45iqxv2gxJPa6h4QiZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

action_items.description: Brief Dave on meeting outcomes; relay any questions from Usman
Connect blog post and case study titles to title tags; create new fields for automatic naming
Schedule call with marketing team to identify and remove old unused pages
Update sitemap URLs from HTTP to HTTPS; fix redirects site-wide
Address 95 non-indexed pages; ensure proper indexing
Notify Jenn when indexing issues are resolved
Add Usman to relevant Slack channel for improved communication
